name: classify_attendance_invalid_time_format_functional
description: Validates that the /classify endpoint returns an error when checkin_time is in an invalid format.
input: POST /classify with AttendanceInput: employee_id='E005', checkin_time='invalid_time', shift_start='09:00', leave_status='None', holiday_status='None', date='2024-06-01'
output: AttendanceOutput with success=False, error_type indicating validation or value error, error_description mentioning invalid time format
success_criteria: response.error_description contains 'Invalid time format' or similar
